preownedConditionHighlights.highlightContent: Each Pre-Owned item listed comes from Walmart’s trusted performance-managed sellers, to ensure you get quality items.
Save even more on top brands & your most-loved items.
Don’t love it? Most items offer a 30-day* free return policy, for added peace of mind.
Shopping Pre-Owned helps in extending the life of an item & reducing waste.

preownedConditionNotes.conditionNoteDetails: Product image for illustration purposes only. The item you receive may vary from the image in minor ways, such as slight differences in appearance, color, and/or design. *Exceptions apply during holiday season, and on certain electronics, collectibles, and jewelry.

preownedConditionSubHeadingAdditionalInf.additionalInfoContent: for additional details & specific condition qualifications.

_rawConfigs.preownedConditionSubHeadingContent: Walmart Pre-Owned allows you to find previously owned, well-cared-for items from Walmart’s trusted & performance-managed sellers. Shopping Pre-Owned allows you to bring home the best-quality picks at even lower prices, in addition to extending the life of an item & reducing waste. Find your favorites & shop a range of conditions in every category.
_rawConfigs.preownedConditionSubHeadingName: What is the Walmart Pre-Owned Program?

preownedConditionTypes.conditionTypeDefinition: Excellent condition but has been gently used or worn previously. Tags and labels are still attached.
Fair condition with visible signs of wear or usage (which can include scratches, fading, missing parts and accessories). Tags or labels may not be attached.
Good condition with minimal signs of wear or usage (may have scuffs, marks, stains or scratches). Tags and labels are still attached.
Brand-new and unused but without original packaging or tags and labels.
Brand-new and unused but without original packaging or tags and labels.
Brand-new, unused, and functional but with cosmetic imperfections caused during production or delivery. This could include missing threads, discoloration, label malfunction, etc.

_rawConfigs.promotionTitle: Save up to 35% on additional pairs
_rawConfigs.termsText:
Purchase multiple pairs of eyeglasses (frame & prescription lenses) to get 20% off each additional pair of glasses after your first order. Multiple qualifying glasses must be purchased during a single online transaction. Qualifying purchases include: a complete pair of prescription eyeglasses (frame & prescription lenses) or an insurance order for a complete pair of glasses. Insurance benefits should be maximized on the first order (if applicable).

Discounts must be applied to qualifying orders that are of equal or lesser value. For 35% off, purchase a complete pair of sunglasses in addition to a second complete pair. Qualifying purchases include any prescription polarized or non-polarized sun lens & frame purchase. The least expensive pair(s) will receive the 35% discount.

configs.promotionTitle: Save up to 35% on additional pairs

product.shortDescription: Get ready to meet your new favorite jean. So effortless this Super Stretchy Jeans lets you pull off a totally flattering look. A three-button mid waistband and faux front fly create a slimming and sexy silhouette. The Super Stretchy Denim - has a skinny fit from thigh to ankle that's totally leg-lengthening but it lets you slide 'em on and go with ease. The Black denim Fits All Body Types.

customerReviews.reviewText: I had liked the fit and style, but these had hung in my closet until this week and there is a hole in them by the zipper, so not very pleased with the quality at all, especially since they were $40 pants, not pleased at all!!
